criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app incorporates artificial intelligence features such as personalized recommendations, chatbots, and visual search.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, user reviews, developer documentation.

criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user rating of the app on app stores, indicating overall user satisfaction.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store ratings.

criteria.name: Download Count
criteria.description: Total number of downloads, reflecting the app's popularity.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store statistics.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range of features offered by the app, such as price comparison, product reviews, and augmented reality previews.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated, indicating active development and responsiveness to user feedback.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store update history.
